name: traceback
description: Incident Context Engine — trace error logs against your codebase using Fetch.ai agents

traceback.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python executable with uagents/fastapi installed (e.g. /Users/you/miniconda3/bin/python). Only used in local mode.

traceback.bridgeUrl.description: Hosted bridge URL (e.g. https://my-traceback.fly.dev). Leave empty to run the bridge locally as a subprocess. When set, no Python process is spawned and API keys stay server-side.

traceback.bridgePort.description: Local bridge port (default 8080). Only used when traceback.bridgeUrl is empty.

scripts.build-frontend: cd src/frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
